title: FightSafe AI: Decision-Support Software for Combat-Sports Safety Monitoring
description: Open-source research software for interpretable temporal risk fusion, TapKO candidate detection, and benchmark evaluation under partial observability. Companion to three manuscripts (Information Fusion, JAS TapKO HITL, FightSafe-Bench). Not a medical device.
notes: Replace placeholder ORCIDs and related DOIs before Zenodo deposit. Large video data are not bundled; see data/README.md.
